operation.name: Project Mercury
operation.objective: Exploring Planet Mercury for life and elements for life creation

operation.name: Lunar Habitat Alpha
operation.objective: Establishment of a permanent human presence on the Lunar South Pole.

operation.name: Mars Rover Curiosity II
operation.objective: Advanced geological sampling and water extraction.

operation.name: Jupiter Orbiter
operation.objective: Analyze the atmosphere and magnetic fields of Jupiter.
